name: Descope
description: Descope authentication and user management platform with no-code flows

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Descope
2. Go to Settings → Company → Management API Keys
3. Create or copy a management key
4. Paste it below

credentialFields.label: Management Key
credentialFields.helpText: Descope → Settings → Company → Management API Keys

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Descope authentication platform is accessible

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists Descope users to verify identity platform access
